history.content:
<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe options are to turn and navigate around the obstacle. I will turn right to face the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m now facing right. The goal is visible to my left side of the map, but there is a wall directly ahead, so I can’t move forward. Turning left would face me upward, where the cell ahead is open and may let me route around the lava. 
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward again. The cell ahead is lava, so I should not move forward. To progress toward the open safe corridor, I need to reorient; turning right will point me toward the safe floor cell beside me.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right. The cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. Turning left would face me upward toward the open path, which is the only safe direction available to continue navigating around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible to my upper-right, but the cells directly ahead from my current orientation are unsafe or blocked in this local view. I should rotate to align with the open floor cell rather than stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D, facing right. The cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot go forward. Turning left would face upward, where the adjacent cell is an open floor, which is the safest way to move toward the goal area on the left side of the map.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am again in the same local layout with the goal visible above and to the right. The space directly ahead is not safe to advance into, so I should rotate to seek a clear path around the lava and walls.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at B5, but I’m currently facing right at D7 with a wall directly ahead. The safest useful move is to turn left to face up, since that opens a path toward the upper corridor and avoids the lava below-left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward in the corridor. The cell directly ahead is safe floor, so moving forward advances me toward the upper area and keeps me away from lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
